{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_48","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nfrom pathlib import Path\nimport numpy as np\nimport solve_supply_chain as sc\n\nroot = Path('/app')\norders = sc.load_orders(root / 'raw_orders')\nsupplier_qty, supplier_seq = sc.load_supplier_deliveries(root / 'raw_supplier_receipts', root / 'raw_wholesaler_receipts')\nstore_seq, store_total = sc.load_store_receipts(root / 'raw_wholesaler_store_receipts')\nconsumer_counts = sc.infer_consumer_counts(root / 'sales_log.csv')\nreported, sold, exposures = sc.simulate(root / 'sales_log.csv', orders, supplier_qty, supplier_seq, store_seq, store_total, consumer_counts)\n\nfor p in range(sc.NUM_PRODUCTS):\n    q = reported[p].astype(float)\n    row = q.sum(axis=1)\n    col = q.sum(axis=0)\n    total = q.sum()\n    mu = np.outer(row, col) / total if total else np.zeros_like(q)\n    bucket = exposures[p]\n    day = np.asarray(bucket['day'], dtype=np.int16)\n    consumer = np.asarray(bucket['consumer'], dtype=np.int16)\n    producer = np.asarray(bucket['producer'], dtype=np.int16)\n    mixed = np.asarray(bucket['mixed'], dtype=np.int8)\n    mask = (mixed == 0) & (day <= sc.NUM_DAYS - 15)\n    if not mask.any():\n        continue\n    day = day[mask]\n    consumer = consumer[mask]\n    producer = producer[mask]\n    pre_num = np.array([q[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_den = np.array([mu[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_ratio = np.divide(pre_num, pre_den, out=np.zeros_like(pre_num), where=pre_den>0)\n    clean = pre_ratio >= 0.9\n    day = day[clean]\n    consumer = consumer[clean]\n    producer = producer[clean]\n    if len(day) == 0:\n        continue\n    first3_num = np.array([q[c, d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    first3_den = np.array([mu[c, d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    win14_num = np.array([q[c, d+1:d+15].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    win14_den = np.array([mu[c, d+1:d+15].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    first3 = np.divide(first3_num, first3_den, out=np.zeros_like(first3_num), where=first3_den>0)\n    win14 = np.divide(win14_num, win14_den, out=np.zeros_like(win14_num), where=win14_den>0)\n    rows=[]\n    for r in np.unique(producer):\n        idx = producer == r\n        if idx.sum() < 40:\n            continue\n        rows.append((idx.sum(), r+1, first3[idx].mean(), win14[idx].mean()))\n    if not rows:\n        continue\n    rows.sort(key=lambda x: (x[2], x[3]))\n    print(f'Product P_{p+1}')\n    for n,r,f3,w14 in rows[:8]:\n        print(f'  PR_{r}: n={n} first3={f3:.3f} win14={w14:.3f}')\n    print()\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

15)\n    day = day[mask]\n    consumer = consumer[mask]\n    producer = producer[mask]\n    if len(day) == 0:\n        continue\n    pre_num = np.array([q[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_den = np.array([mu[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_ratio = np.divide(pre_num, pre_den, out=np.zeros_like(pre_num), where=pre_den>0)\n    clean = pre_ratio >= 0.9\n    day = day[clean]\n    consumer = consumer[clean]\n    producer = producer[clean]\n    first3_num = np.array([q[c, d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    first3_den = np.array([mu[c, d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    first3 = np.divide(first3_num, first3_den, out=np.zeros_like(first3_num), where=first3_den>0)\n    overall = first3.mean()\n    means=[]\n    for r in np.unique(producer):\n        idx = producer == r\n        if idx.sum() < 40:\n            continue\n        means.append(first3[idx].mean())\n    means=np.array(means)\n    print(f'P_{p+1}: overall={overall:.3f} min={means.min():.3f} q10={np.quantile(means,0.1):.3f} median={np.median(means):.3f} q90={np.quantile(means,0.9):.3f} max={means.max():.3f}')\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_53","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nfrom pathlib import Path\nimport numpy as np\nimport solve_supply_chain as sc\n\nK = np.array([0.8, 0.5, 0.2])\nK2 = (K*K).sum()\n\nroot = Path('/app')\norders = sc.load_orders(root / 'raw_orders')\nsupplier_qty, supplier_seq = sc.load_supplier_deliveries(root / 'raw_supplier_receipts', root / 'raw_wholesaler_receipts')\nstore_seq, store_total = sc.load_store_receipts(root / 'raw_wholesaler_store_receipts')\nconsumer_counts = sc.infer_consumer_counts(root / 'sales_log.csv')\nreported, sold, exposures = sc.simulate(root / 'sales_log.csv', orders, supplier_qty, supplier_seq, store_seq, store_total, consumer_counts)\n\nfor p in range(sc.NUM_PRODUCTS):\n    q = reported[p].astype(float)\n    row = q.sum(axis=1)\n    col = q.sum(axis=0)\n    total = q.sum()\n    mu = np.outer(row, col) / total if total else np.zeros_like(q)\n    bucket = exposures[p]\n    day = np.asarray(bucket['day'], dtype=np.int16)\n    consumer = np.asarray(bucket['consumer'], dtype=np.int16)\n    producer = np.asarray(bucket['producer'], dtype=np.int16)\n    mixed = np.asarray(bucket['mixed'], dtype=np.int8)\n    mask = (mixed == 0) & (day <= sc.NUM_DAYS - 15)\n    day = day[mask]\n    consumer = consumer[mask]\n    producer = producer[mask]\n    if len(day) == 0:\n        continue\n    pre_num = np.array([q[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_den = np.array([mu[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_ratio = np.divide(pre_num, pre_den, out=np.zeros_like(pre_num), where=pre_den>0)\n    clean = pre_ratio >= 0.9\n    day = day[clean]\n    consumer = consumer[clean]\n    producer = producer[clean]\n    if len(day) == 0:\n        continue\n    traj = np.column_stack([\n        np.divide(np.array([q[c,d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]), np.array([mu[c,d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)])),\n        np.divide(np.array([q[c,d+4:d+8].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]), np.array([mu[c,d+4:d+8].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)])),\n        np.divide(np.array([q[c,d+8:d+15].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]), np.array([mu[c,d+8:d+15].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)])),\n    ])\n    rows=[]\n    producer_traj=[]\n    counts=[]\n    ids=[]\n    for r in np.unique(producer):\n        idx = producer == r\n        if idx.sum() < 100:\n            continue\n        ids.append(r)\n        counts.append(idx.sum())\n        producer_traj.append(traj[idx].mean(axis=0))\n    if not ids:\n        continue\n    producer_traj = np.array(producer_traj)\n    base = np.median(producer_traj, axis=0)\n    for r,n,y in zip(ids, counts, producer_traj):\n        diff = base - y\n        alpha = max(0.0, float(diff.dot(K) / K2))\n        err = float(np.sqrt(((diff - alpha*K)**2).mean()))\n        rows.append((alpha, err, n, r+1, *y, *(base-y)))\n    rows.sort(key=lambda x: (-x[0], x[1]))\n    print(f'Product P_{p+1} base={base.round(3).tolist()}')\n    for alpha,err,n,r,a,b,c,d1,d2,d3 in rows[:8]:\n        print(f'  PR_{r}: alpha={alpha:.3f} err={err:.3f} n={n} traj=({a:.3f},{b:.3f},{c:.3f}) diff=({d1:.3f},{d2:.3f},{d3:.3f})')\n    print()\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

15)\n    day = day[mask]\n    consumer = consumer[mask]\n    producer = producer[mask]\n    pre_num = np.array([q[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_den = np.array([mu[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_ratio = np.divide(pre_num, pre_den, out=np.zeros_like(pre_num), where=pre_den>0)\n    clean = pre_ratio >= 0.9\n    day = day[clean]\n    consumer = consumer[clean]\n    producer = producer[clean]\n    w13 = np.divide(np.array([q[c,d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]), np.array([mu[c,d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]))\n    w47 = np.divide(np.array([q[c,d+4:d+8].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]), np.array([mu[c,d+4:d+8].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]))\n    w814 = np.divide(np.array([q[c,d+8:d+15].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]), np.array([mu[c,d+8:d+15].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]))\n    target = producer == r\n    counts = {}\n    for c in np.unique(consumer[target]):\n        idx_r = target & (consumer == c)\n        idx_o = (producer \"'!= r) & (consumer == c)\n        counts[int(c)] = (idx_r.sum(), idx_o.sum(), w13[idx_r].mean(), w47[idx_r].mean(), w814[idx_r].mean(), w13[idx_o].mean() if idx_o.any() else np.nan, w47[idx_o].mean() if idx_o.any() else np.nan, w814[idx_o].mean() if idx_o.any() else np.nan)\n    top = sorted(counts.items(), key=lambda kv: (-kv[1][0], kv[1][2]))[:12]\n    print(p_id, r_id, '\"'consumers', len(counts), 'events', target.sum())\n    for c,(nr,no,a,b,c3,oa,ob,oc) in top:\n        print(f'  C{c}: r_n={nr} other_n={no} r=({a:.3f},{b:.3f},{c3:.3f}) other=({oa:.3f},{ob:.3f},{oc:.3f})')\n    print()\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

15)\n    day = day[mask]\n    consumer = consumer[mask]\n    producer = producer[mask]\n    if len(day) == 0:\n        continue\n    pre_num = np.array([q[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_den = np.array([mu[c, max(0,d-7):d].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)], dtype=float)\n    pre_ratio = np.divide(pre_num, pre_den, out=np.zeros_like(pre_num), where=pre_den>0)\n    clean = pre_ratio >= 0.9\n    day = day[clean]\n    consumer = consumer[clean]\n    producer = producer[clean]\n    if len(day) == 0:\n        continue\n    traj = np.column_stack([\n        np.divide(np.array([q[c,d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]), np.array([mu[c,d+1:d+4].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)])),\n        np.divide(np.array([q[c,d+4:d+8].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]), np.array([mu[c,d+4:d+8].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)])),\n        np.divide(np.array([q[c,d+8:d+15].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)]), np.array([mu[c,d+8:d+15].sum() for c,d in zip(consumer, day)])),\n    ])\n    ids=[]\n    counts=[]\n    producer_traj=[]\n    for r in np.unique(producer):\n        idx = producer == r\n        if idx.sum() < 100:\n            continue\n        ids.append(r)\n        counts.append(idx.sum())\n        producer_traj.append(traj[idx].mean(axis=0))\n    producer_traj = np.array(producer_traj)\n    base = np.median(producer_traj, axis=0)\n    confirmed=[]\n    for r,n,y in zip(ids, counts, producer_traj):\n        diff = base - y\n        alpha = max(0.0, float(diff.dot(K) / K2))\n        err = float(np.sqrt(((diff - alpha*K)**2).mean()))\n        if alpha >= 0.025 and err <= 0.012:\n            confirmed.append((r+1, alpha, err, n, *y))\n    print(f'P_{p+1}:', confirmed)\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_71","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nfrom pathlib import Path\nimport math\nimport numpy as np\nimport solve_supply_chain as sc\n\nCANDS=[('P_1','PR_16'),('P_1','PR_32'),('P_2','PR_4'),('P_2','PR_41'),('P_4','PR_2'),('P_8','PR_15'),('P_8','PR_54'),('P_9','PR_21'),('P_11','PR_21'),('P_14','PR_20'),('P_19','PR_53'),('P_19','PR_59'),('P_20','PR_51'),('P_22','PR_25'),('P_23','PR_2'),('P_30','PR_41'),('P_10','PR_58')]\nM = np.array([1.0,0.2,0.2,0.2,0.5,0.5,0.5,0.5,0.8,0.8,0.8,0.8,0.8,0.8,0.8])\nNSTATE = len(M)\nGRID = np.linspace(0.0, 0.35, 36)\n\nroot=Path('/app')\norders=sc.load_orders(root/'raw_orders')\nsupplier_qty,supplier_seq=sc.load_supplier_deliveries(root/'raw_supplier_receipts', root/'raw_wholesaler_receipts')\nstore_seq,store_total=sc.load_store_receipts(root/'raw_wholesaler_store_receipts')\nconsumer_counts=sc.infer_consumer_counts(root/'sales_log.csv')\nreported,sold,exposures=sc.simulate(root/'sales_log.csv', orders, supplier_qty, supplier_seq, store_seq, store_total, consumer_counts)\n\n# Build exposure booleans for candidate pairs.\n# exposures[p] stores batch parts; collapse to consumer-day-producer presence.\nprod_presence = {}\nfor p_idx, bucket in enumerate(exposures):\n    day = np.asarray(bucket['day'], dtype=np.int16)\n    consumer = np.asarray(bucket['consumer'], dtype=np.int16)\n    producer = np.asarray(bucket['producer'], dtype=np.int16)\n    key = np.stack([consumer, day, producer], axis=1)\n    # unique rows to day-level presence\n    uniq = np.unique(key, axis=0)\n    prod_presence[p_idx] = uniq\n\nfor p_id, r_id in CANDS:\n    p = sc.product_idx(p_id)\n    r = sc.producer_idx(r_id)\n    q = reported[p].astype(float)\n    row = q.sum(axis=1)\n    col = q.sum(axis=0)\n    total = q.sum()\n    mu = np.outer(row, col) / total if total else np.zeros_like(q)\n    mu = np.maximum(mu, 1e-9)\n    expo = np.zeros_like(q, dtype=np.int8)\n    uniq = prod_presence[p]\n    mask = uniq[:,2] == r\n    expo[uniq[mask][:,0], uniq[mask][:,1]] = 1\n    # Precompute log emissions for each state\n    # Ignore log(q\"'!) constant across states.\n    log_mu = np.log(mu)\n    emit = np.empty((NSTATE, *q.shape), dtype=float)\n    for s in range(NSTATE):\n        lam = mu * M[s]\n        emit[s] = q * (log_mu + math.log(M[s])) - lam\n    best_theta = None\n    best_ll = -1e300\n    ll0 = None\n    for theta in GRID:\n        total_ll = 0.0\n        for c in range(q.shape[0]):\n            # alpha for day 0 state only normal\n            alpha = np.full(NSTATE, -1e300)\n            alpha[0] = emit[0, c, 0]\n            for t in range(q.shape[1]-1):\n                exp_t = expo[c, t]\n                if exp_t:\n                    p_bad = theta\n                else:\n                    p_bad = 0.0\n                next_alpha = np.full(NSTATE, -1e300)\n                # bad transition to state 1 (index 1) from any prior state? wait state 1 corresponds recovery day1 next day.\n                if p_bad > 0:\n                    # any prior state transitions to state1 with p_bad\n                    m = alpha.max()\n                    next_alpha[1] = emit[1, c, t+1] + math.log(p_bad) + (m + math.log(np.exp(alpha - m).sum()))\n                # no-bad deterministic progression\n                log_no = math.log(1.0 - p_bad) if p_bad < 1 else -1e300\n                # state 0 -> 0\n                next_alpha[0] = np.logaddexp(next_alpha[0], alpha[0] + log_no + emit[0, c, t+1])\n                # states 1..13 -> next state\n                for s in range(1, 14):\n                    next_alpha[s+1] = np.logaddexp(next_alpha[s+1], alpha[s] + log_no + emit[s+1, c, t+1])\n                # state 14 -> 0\n                next_alpha[0] = np.logaddexp(next_alpha[0], alpha[14] + log_no + emit[0, c, t+1])\n                alpha = next_alpha\n            m = alpha.max()\n            total_ll += m + math.log(np.exp(alpha - m).sum())\n        if theta == 0.0:\n            ll0 = total_ll\n        if total_ll > best_ll:\n            best_ll = total_ll\n            best_theta = theta\n    print(p_id, r_id, '\"'best_theta', best_theta, 'll_gain', round(best_ll - ll0, 2), 'events', int(expo.sum()))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
